title: 宿敵現る！ワガママ王女との場外乱闘

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at a cafe that's been rented out to film a TV
special! And my discussion partner is Sweep!
Wha—?! Why's she picking a fight?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win the Queen Elizabeth II Cup and
show everyone that I'm a princess!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trainer's being all sneaky and hides some kind of
bag from me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No way! Could it be a present for when I win the
Queen Elizabeth II Cup?! Ohhh! Time for a
Princess☆Bomber!
